subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and as time is most limited, a brief reply is herein penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و میثاق نامه ات رسید چون فرصت بسیار کم است مختصر مرقوم میگردد داوود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @prayer for forgiveness
